story_title: Star Wars: Episode IV — A New Hope

relationships.description: Obi-Wan trains Luke in the Force and reveals his heritage
Vader killed Luke's father (or so Luke believes)
Princess in need of rescue; they become comrades
Reluctant partner who becomes a trusted friend
Former student turned to the dark side
Unknown to Luke, Vader is his father
Initially skeptical, grows to respect Luke
Antagonistic attraction that deepens into love
Imperial partner; Tarkin commands, Vader enforces

places.name: Tatooine
places.description: Twin-sunned desert planet, remote and provincial. Moisture farms dot the barren landscape.

places.name: Mos Eisley Cantina
places.description: A seedy spaceport bar filled with smugglers, bounty hunters, and criminals — the gateway to the larger galaxy.

places.name: Death Star
places.description: Imperial battle station the size of a moon. Labyrinthine corridors, oppressive architecture, and overwhelming firepower.

places.name: Yavin IV Rebel Base
places.description: Hidden jungle moon housing the Rebel Alliance's main base. Ancient temples repurposed as hangars and command centers.

places.name: Death Star Trench
places.description: The narrow trench leading to the thermal exhaust port — the final approach run where everything depends on one shot.

objects.name: Anakin's Lightsaber
objects.description: Blue-bladed lightsaber, inherited from Luke's father via Obi-Wan.
objects.significance: Gift from mentor; symbol of Jedi heritage and the father Luke never knew.
rules: Requires Force sensitivity to wield effectively

objects.name: Death Star Plans
objects.description: Technical readouts of the Death Star hidden in R2-D2's memory banks.
objects.significance: The entire mission hinges on delivering these plans to the Rebellion.
rules: Reveal the thermal exhaust port vulnerability

objects.name: Death Star (as weapon)
objects.description: Planet-destroying superlaser — the Empire's ultimate weapon of terror.
objects.significance: Represents the overwhelming power the heroes must overcome.

moments.label: Life on the Farm
moments.description: Luke lives a restless existence on Uncle Owen's moisture farm, yearning for something more.

char_luke.wants: to leave Tatooine and join the Academy
knows: nothing about his father's true identity

moments.label: Leia's Message
moments.description: R2-D2 plays Princess Leia's holographic plea for help. Luke's aunt and uncle are killed by stormtroopers.

char_luke.wants: to help the Rebellion and avenge his family

transitions.detail: Princess Leia needs help; the droids carry vital information
Uncle Owen and Aunt Beru killed by stormtroopers

transitions.description: Commits to going with Obi-Wan to Alderaan

moments.label: Meeting Obi-Wan
moments.description: Obi-Wan reveals the truth about Luke's father, gives him the lightsaber, and begins his training.

char_luke.wants: to learn the ways of the Force
knows: his father was a Jedi Knight

transitions.description: Obi-Wan gives Luke his father's lightsaber

transitions.detail: His father was a Jedi Knight killed by Darth Vader

moments.label: Mos Eisley and the Millennium Falcon
moments.description: Luke and Obi-Wan enter the dangerous Mos Eisley cantina, hire Han Solo, and blast off from Tatooine.

transitions.description: Leaves Tatooine for the first time

moments.label: Aboard the Millennium Falcon
moments.description: Luke trains with the lightsaber, learns about the Force, and the group is captured by the Death Star's tractor beam.

transitions.detail: Begins training in the Force with the lightsaber

transitions.description: Captured and brought aboard the Death Star

moments.label: Infiltrating the Death Star
moments.description: The group disguises themselves and infiltrates the station. Luke discovers Leia is imprisoned and decides to rescue her.

transitions.detail: Princess Leia is a prisoner on this station

transitions.description: Chooses to rescue Leia despite the danger

moments.label: Obi-Wan's Sacrifice
moments.description: Obi-Wan confronts Vader and allows himself to be struck down, becoming one with the Force.

char_luke.wants: to destroy the Empire and honor Obi-Wan's sacrifice

transitions.description: Lets Vader strike him down, becoming one with the Force
Loss of mentor forces Luke to rely on himself and the Force

moments.label: Escape with the Princess
moments.description: The group escapes the Death Star with Leia and the plans, regrouping at the Rebel base.

transitions.description: Reaches the Rebel base on Yavin IV
Delivers the Death Star plans to the Rebellion

moments.label: Battle Briefing
moments.description: The Rebels analyze the plans and discover the thermal exhaust port weakness. Luke volunteers for the attack run.

transitions.detail: The Death Star has a thermal exhaust port vulnerability

transitions.description: Volunteers to fly the attack mission

moments.label: The Trench Run
moments.description: Luke flies the trench run, hears Obi-Wan's voice, trusts the Force, and fires the shot that destroys the Death Star.

knows: Obi-Wan is still with him in spirit

transitions.description: Turns off the targeting computer and trusts the Force
Becomes a true hero by trusting in something beyond himself
Returns at the last moment to save Luke from Vader

moments.label: Medal Ceremony
moments.description: Luke, Han, and Chewbacca are honored at the Rebel base. Luke has become a hero of the Rebellion.

transitions.description: Revealed as a hero to the Rebellion and to himself
